          classical
          let b := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
          let n := Fintype.card b.indexType
          have hb : b.range ⊆ Set.range (b : b.indexType → V) := by simp

        Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ)) (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))

        refine' Set.Finite.subset _ _
        · exact Set.finite_toSet S
        · intro v hv
          have hv' : v ∉ S := hv
          -- Since φ is a ℚ-linear automorphism, it preserves the lattice at almost all places
          -- More precisely, for all but finitely many v, φ maps the integral lattice into itself
          -- and similarly for φ⁻¹, so it induces a bijection on the lattice tensor Z_v

              LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap := rfl

          simp only [Set.mem_range, Function.comp_apply]
          constructor
          · intro y hy
            obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hy
            use φ x
            simp [hφ]
            -- Use that φ preserves the lattice at v since v ∉ S
            sorry
          · intro y hy
            obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hy
            use φ.symm x
            simp [hφ]
            -- Use that φ⁻¹ preserves the lattice at v since v ∉ S
            sorry
      exact this

        intro v
        -- Since φ is a ℚ-linear automorphism, it preserves the lattice up to scaling.
        -- For all but finitely many v, φ and φ⁻¹ map the integral lattice into itself.
        have hφ : ∃ d : ℤ, d ≠ 0 ∧ ∀ x ∈ (IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V).range, φ x ∈ (d : ℚ) • (Submodule.span ℤ (Set.range (IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V))) := by
          -- Use that φ has matrix with rational entries; clear denominators.
          classical
          let b := Module.Basis.ofVectorSpace ℚ V
          let M := Matrix.of fun i j => (b.repr (φ (b j))).coords i
          have hM : ∀ i j, M i j ∈ ℚ := by simp
          obtain ⟨d, hd, hdM⟩ := exists_integer_multiple_of_finite_set (Finset.image (fun ij : (b.indexType × b.indexType) ↦ M ij.1 ij.2) Finset.univ)
          use d, hd
          intro x hx
          -- ... (details omitted for brevity, but standard argument)
          sorry
        -- Now, for v not dividing d, multiplication by d is invertible in v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ,
        -- so φ preserves the lattice tensored with v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ.
        sorry
      exact this

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ).toAddEquiv)
          (Set.range (⇑(LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)))
          (Set.range (⇑(LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        let S := {v | ¬ Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ).toAddEquiv)
          (Set.range (⇑(LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)))
          (Set.range (⇑(LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)))}
        suffices S.Finite by exact this
        have hφ : ∃ (M : Matrix (Fin (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℚ V)) (Fin (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℚ V)) ℚ),
          φ = LinearEquiv.ofMatrix' M := by
          classical
          exact ⟨Matrix.of (fun i j ↦ (φ (Basis.ofVectorSpace ℚ V j)) i), by ext; rfl⟩
        obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hφ
        let T := {p : ℕ | p.Prime ∧ (∃ i j, padicValRat p (M i j) ≠ 0 ∨ padicValRat p (M⁻¹ i j) ≠ 0)}
        have hT : T.Finite := by
          classical
          apply Set.Finite.subset (Set.finite_union (Set.finite_bUnion (Finset.finite_toSet _) fun i ↦
            Set.finite_bUnion (Finset.finite_toSet _) fun j ↦
              (Set.finite_union (padicValRat_finite_support (M i j)) (padicValRat_finite_support (M⁻¹ i j)))))
          intro p hp
          simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hp ⊢
          aesop
        refine' Set.Finite.subset hT fun v hv ↦ _
        simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hv ⊢
        contrapose! hv
        simp_all [Set.BijOn, Function.Bijective]

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ)) (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))
          (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := IntegralLattice.exists_finite_set_mul_mem (φ.toLinearMap)
        refine' ⟨S, fun v hv ↦ _⟩
        rw [Set.bijOn_iff]
        constructor
        · intro x hx
          obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := Set.mem_range.mp hx
          rw [LinearMap.map_lTensor_apply]
          have : φ y ∈ (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) := by
            apply Submodule.mem_of_mem_span
            rw [Submodule.span_eq_top]
            exact hS v hv y (Submodule.mem_span_self _ _)
          exact ⟨φ y, Submodule.subset_span (Submodule.mem_toSubmodule _), LinearMap.map_lTensor_apply _ _ _⟩
        · intro x y hx hy hxy
          obtain ⟨x', hx', rfl⟩ := Set.mem_range.mp hx
          obtain ⟨y', hy', rfl⟩ := Set.mem_range.mp hy
          simp only [LinearMap.map_lTensor_apply] at hxy
          apply_fun (fun z ↦ (c_v_alg V v).symm z) at hxy
          simp only [Equiv.symm_apply_apply, LinearMap.map_lTensor_apply] at hxy
          apply_fun (fun z ↦ z ⊗ₜ 1) at hxy
          simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_one, LinearEquiv.map_injective.eq_iff (IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V).equiv] at hxy
          exact hxy
        · intro x hx
          obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := Set.mem_range.mp hx
          rw [LinearMap.map_lTensor_apply]
          have : φ.symm y ∈ (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) := by
            apply Submodule.mem_of_mem_span
            rw [Submodule.span_eq_top]
            exact hS v hv y (Submodule.mem_span_self _ _)
          exact ⟨φ.symm y, Submodule.subset_span (Submodule.mem_toSubmodule _),
            by simp [LinearMap.map_lTensor_apply, Equiv.apply_symm_apply]⟩
      exact this

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ).toContinuousAddEquiv)
          (Set.range (⇑(LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)))
          (Set.range (⇑(LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_of_forall
        intro v
        -- Since φ is a ℚ-linear automorphism of V, it preserves the lattice up to scaling.
        -- For all but finitely many v, φ and φ⁻¹ preserve the integral lattice ⊗ ℤ_v.
        have hφ : ∃ d : ℚˣ, ∀ x ∈ (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V : Set V), φ x ∈ d • (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) := by
          -- This follows from finite generation of the lattice and linearity of φ.
          sorry
        have hφinv : ∃ d' : ℚˣ, ∀ x ∈ (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V : Set V), φ.symm x ∈ d' • (IntegralLattice ℤ ℤ ℚ V) := by
          sorry
        -- For v not dividing denominators of d or d', φ preserves the local lattice.
        sorry
      exact this

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ)) (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))
          (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := LinearEquiv.isIntegralAwayFromFiniteSet φ
        refine' Set.Finite.subset _ hS
        intro v hv
        simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hv ⊢
        rw [Set.bijOn_iff]
        constructor
        · intro x hx
          obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := hx
          use φ y
          simp [hy, hv]
        · intro x y hx hy hxy
          obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hx
          obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := hy
          simp_all only [LinearEquiv.map_eq_map_iff]
          exact Submodule.ext_iff.mp (Submodule.linearIndependent_iff.mpr (LinearEquiv.linearIndependent_iff.mpr
            (Module.basis_of_vectorSpace_is_linearIndependent ℚ V)) _ _ _) a b (by simp_all)
      exact this

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ).toEquiv)
          (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))
          (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        let S := {v | ¬ Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ).toEquiv)
          (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))
          (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))}
        suffices S.Finite by exact this
        classical
        have hφ : ∃ (M : Matrix (Fin (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℚ V)) (Fin (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℚ V)) ℚ),
          φ = LinearEquiv.ofMatrix' M := by
          apply FiniteDimensional.exists_isometry_with_matrix
        cases' hφ with M hM
        have hM' : ∃ (d : ℤ), d ≠ 0 ∧ ∀ i j, (M i j).den = d := by
          use ∏ i, ∏ j, (M i j).den
          constructor
          · intro hd
            simp_all [Finset.prod_eq_zero_iff]
          · intro i j
            simp [Finset.prod_dvd_of_mem]
        cases' hM' with d hd
        have hd' : d ≠ 0 := hd.1
        have hS : S ⊆ {v | ↑d ∈ v.asIdeal} := by
          intro v hv
          contrapose! hv
          simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_not] at hv
          have hunit : IsUnit (d : v.adicCompletion ℚ) := by
            rw [IsUnit_iff_norm_ne_zero]
            simp [hv, IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation_apply_eq_zero_iff]
          -- Since d is a unit, φ preserves the lattice at v
          sorry
        have : {v | ↑d ∈ v.asIdeal}.Finite := IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.finite_setOf_mem_ideal d hd'
        exact Set.Finite.subset this hS
      exact this

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ).toContinuousAddEquiv)
          (Set.range (⇑(LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)))
          (Set.range (⇑(LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        obtain ⟨S, hS, hφ⟩ := Module.Finite.exists_finset_isIntegral_of_isIntegral ℤ (φ.toLinearMap)
        refine' ⟨S, fun v hv ↦ _⟩
        rw [Set.bijOn_iff]
        constructor
        · intro x hx
          obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := hx
          rw [← LinearMap.map_lTensor_apply] at hy ⊢
          simp_all [hφ hv]
        · intro x y hx hy hxy
          obtain ⟨x', hx'⟩ := hx
          obtain ⟨y', hy'⟩ := hy
          rw [← LinearMap.map_lTensor_apply, ← LinearMap.map_lTensor_apply] at hxy
          simp_all [hφ hv, LinearMap.injective_of_invertible]
      exact this

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ)) (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))
          (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := Module.Finite.exists_finset_basis ℤ (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
        let T := S.image (fun x ↦ (φ x : V))
        have hT : T.Finite := Set.Finite.image _ hS.finite_toSet
        refine' Set.Finite.subset_compl_iff.mpr fun p hp ↦ _
        simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hp
        intro y hy
        obtain ⟨z, rfl⟩ := hy
        rw [LinearMap.lTensor_apply] at *
        simp_all [LinearMap.map_smul]
        exact Submodule.mem_span_image_of_mem_span _ _ z.2
      exact this

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap
          ∘ₗ (LinearEquiv.baseChange ℤ (v.adicCompletion ℚ) _ _ (IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V)).symm ∘ₗ
            LinearEquiv.baseChange ℚ (v.adicCompletion ℚ) _ _ φ =
        LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := IntegralLattice.exists_finite_set_of_not_preserved ℤ ℚ V φ
        refine' Set.Finite.subset _ hS
        intro v hv
        simp_all [LinearEquiv.baseChange_apply, TensorProduct.tmul_eq_tmul]
      filter_upwards [this] with v hv
      simp_all [Set.BijOn, Function.comp_apply]

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        Set.BijOn (⇑(Aux.continuousBaseChange _ φ)) (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap))
          (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap)) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        let S := {v | ¬ Set.BijOn (⇑φ) (Set.univ : Set V) (Set.univ : Set V)} -- actually we need integrality
        -- Since φ is ℚ-linear, there exists a nonzero d ∈ ℤ such that d·φ and d·φ⁻¹ preserve the ℤ-lattice
        obtain ⟨d, hd⟩ := exists_zmultiples_preserve_lattice φ
        use {v | (v : Ideal (RingOfIntegers ℚ)) ∣ (Ideal.span {d} : Ideal (RingOfIntegers ℚ))}
        refine' Set.Finite.subset _ (fun v hv ↦ _)
        · exact IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.finite_set_of_dvd _
        · -- For v not dividing d, φ preserves the local lattice
          simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hv
          have h1 : LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap =
            LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (algebraMap _ (v.adicCompletion ℚ)).comp (Submodule.subtype _)
          have h2 : (Aux.continuousBaseChange _ φ) = TensorProduct.RightActions.LinearEquiv.baseChange _ _ _ _ φ
          -- Use that φ preserves the lattice after inverting d, and v doesn't divide d
          exact bijOn_of_preserves_lattice_after_inverting_d φ d hd v hv
      exact this

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap
          '' Set.univ ⊆ (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap) ⁻¹'
          (Set.range (φ.toLinearMap ⊗ₗ[ℚ] LinearMap.id)) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        use {v | ¬(v.valuation ℚ).isUnit (φ.det)}
        intro v hv
        simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_not] at hv
        -- Since φ has determinant a unit at v, it preserves the lattice
        sorry
      exact this

have : ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
        Set.BijOn (⇑(continuousBaseChange _ φ)) (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap))
          (Set.range (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)) := by
        apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
        obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := Module.Finite.exists_basis_int_coeff ℤ (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) φ
        refine' Set.Finite.subset _ hS
        intro v hv
        simp only [Set.BijOn, Set.mem_range, LinearMap.mem_range]
        have hv' : v ∉ S := hv
        have hφ := Module.Finite.basis_int_coeff_mem_subring ℤ (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) φ hv'
        exact ⟨fun x hx ↦ by simpa using hφ hx, fun x hx ↦ by simpa using hφ.symm hx⟩
      exact this
